message: fix(ci): align protocol and cron gates

@@ -1893,19 +1893,22 @@ public struct ConfigApplyParams: Codable, Sendable {

         self.sessionkey = sessionkey

         self.note = note
         self.restartdelayms = restartdelayms
     }
